title: task
description: address.rs:214-215 - Test module uses 'use alloc::vec' and 'use alloc::format' but the test module is not gated by #[cfg(feature = "alloc")]. The known_nodes() method is also alloc-gated but called unconditionally in test_known_nodes. This causes compilation failure when running 'cargo test' without --features alloc.
close_reason: Fixed: Separated alloc-dependent tests into nested module with cfg(feature = alloc); 9 tests now run without alloc, 2 remain gated
